allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path . -Directory -Recurse -Depth 2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @\('build','.gradle','.idea','caches','.cxx','captures'\) } | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Path=$_.FullName; SizeMB=[math]::Round\($size/1MB,2\)} } | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending)
